title: Crispy Bitter Moroccan Pistachios Toast
description: A quick, dairyfree Moroccan-inspired snack featuring toasted bread topped with a crunchy, flavorful pistachio mix and a hint of bitter orange zest.
instructions: Preheat a non‑stick skillet over medium heat.
Toast the bread slices lightly on both sides until golden and crisp, about 2 minutes per side; set aside.
In a small bowl, combine ground pistachios, bitter orange zest, sumac, smoked paprika, chili flakes, and sea salt.
Heat the olive oil in the same skillet until shimmering but not smoking, about 30 seconds.
Add the pistachio mixture to the skillet, sautéing and toasting the nuts for 2‑3 minutes until fragrant and slightly browned. Stir frequently to avoid burning.
Remove from heat and spread the warm pistachio topping evenly over each toasted bread slice.
Serve immediately, optionally sprinkling a tiny pinch of sea salt for extra flavor.
